notes: Founder idea: a market for donating items of value to people in need. V1 = post, browse, search, claim, mark handed-off.

steps.spec: SQL only. Idempotent CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS giving_donations with: id bigint PRIMARY KEY GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY, donor_id bigint (nullable for anon), title text NOT NULL, description text, condition text, category text, location text, images jsonb default '[]'::jsonb, donor_contact text, claimer_id bigint, claimer_contact text, status text default 'available', created_at timestamptz default now(), updated_at timestamptz default now(), claimed_at timestamptz, handed_off_at timestamptz. Add ON UPDATE trigger for updated_at. No DROP, no destructive ALTER.

ESM. Create a service factory function createGivingMarketplaceService({ pool }) that returns an object with async methods: createDonation(donation), listAvailableDonations(filters), searchDonations(query), claimDonation(donationId, claimer), markHandedOff(donationId, donorId), getDonation(donationId), listMyDonations(userId). Use parameterised SQL only. No browser globals. @ssot docs/products/giving-marketplace/PRODUCT_HOME.md.

ESM. Export async function registerGivingMarketplaceRoutes(app, deps). Mount routes under /api/v1/giving-marketplace: POST /donations, GET /donations, GET /donations/:id, POST /donations/:id/claim, POST /donations/:id/handoff. Use deps.pool to create the service. Validate donor/claimer contact exists. Return JSON. No browser globals. @ssot docs/products/giving-marketplace/PRODUCT_HOME.md.
